svg_data.svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 1920 1080" font-family="'Segoe UI', Arial, sans-serif">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#0c1322"/><stop offset="1" stop-color="#0a1a2e"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="card" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#152037"/><stop offset="1" stop-color="#0e192c"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="heatScale" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="0">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#1e3a5f"/>
      <stop offset="0.25" stop-color="#22d3ee"/>
      <stop offset="0.5" stop-color="#22c55e"/>
      <stop offset="0.75" stop-color="#f59e0b"/>
      <stop offset="1" stop-color="#ef4444"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="flame" x1="0" y1="1" x2="0" y2="0">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#fde047"/>
      <stop offset="0.5" stop-color="#fb923c"/>
      <stop offset="1" stop-color="#dc2626"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="1920" height="1080" fill="url(#bg)"/>

  <!-- HEADER -->
  <rect x="0" y="0" width="1920" height="84" fill="#06101f"/>
  <text x="32" y="34" fill="#fbbf24" font-size="12" letter-spacing="4">LITMUS EDGE  •  SP4 SINTER PLANT</text>
  <text x="32" y="64" fill="#e2e8f0" font-size="26" font-weight="700">Critical Process Monitoring</text>
  <text x="1888" y="34" fill="#94a3b8" font-size="12" text-anchor="end">18 windboxes  ·  11 hood zones  ·  5 strand bed temps</text>
  <text x="1888" y="58" fill="#94a3b8" font-size="12" text-anchor="end">DB: tsdata  ·  Measurement: SP4Iba.94F1A3D6…D360</text>
  <text x="1888" y="76" fill="#94a3b8" font-size="11" text-anchor="end" id="header_updated">Updated --:--:--</text>
  <rect x="0" y="84" width="1920" height="2" fill="#1e3a5f"/>

  <!-- ========== SECTION 1 — SINTER STRAND WINDBOX MAP ========== -->
  <g transform="translate(24,100)">
    <rect width="1280" height="460" rx="14" fill="url(#card)" stroke="#1e3a5f"/>
    <text x="20" y="32" fill="#e2e8f0" font-size="16" font-weight="600">Sinter Strand — Windbox Map (ΔP + Bed Temperatures + BTP)</text>
    <text x="20" y="52" fill="#64748b" font-size="11">18 WINDBOX_*_DIFFERENTIAL_PRESSURE  ·  5 E4TI bed temps  ·  burn-through point follows hottest bed</text>

    <!-- Strand layout: 18 cells across 1240px width with 4px gap -->
    <!-- Windbox cells (filled by JS based on ΔP) -->
    <rect id="wb2_cell" x="40.0" y="130" width="63.8" height="80" fill="#1e3a5f" stroke="#0a1a2e" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <rect id="wb3_cell" x="106.8" y="130" width="63.8" height="80" fill="#1e3a5f" stroke="#0a1a2e" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <rect id="wb4_cell" x="173.7" y="130" width="63.8" height="80" fill="#1e3a5f" stroke="#0a1a2e" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <rect id="wb5_cell" x="240.5" y="130" width="63.8" height="80" fill="#1e3a5f" stroke="#0a1a2e" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <rect id="wb6_cell" x="307.3" y="130" width="63.8" height="80" fill="#1e3a5f" stroke="#0a1a2e" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <rect id="wb7_cell" x="374.2" y="130" width="63.8" height="80" fill="#1e3a5f" stroke="#0a1a2e" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <rect id="wb8_cell" x="441.0" y="130" width="63.8" height="80" fill="#1e3a5f" stroke="#0a1a2e" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <rect id="wb9_cell" x="507.8" y="130" width="63.8" height="80" fill="#1e3a5f" stroke="#0a1a2e" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <rect id="wb10_cell" x="574.7" y="130" width="63.8" height="80" fill="#1e3a5f" stroke="#0a1a2e" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <rect id="wb11_cell" x="641.5" y="130" width="63.8" height="80" fill="#1e3a5f" stroke="#0a1a2e" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <rect id="wb13_cell" x="708.3" y="130" width="63.8" height="80" fill="#1e3a5f" stroke="#0a1a2e" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <rect id="wb14_cell" x="775.2" y="130" width="63.8" height="80" fill="#1e3a5f" stroke="#0a1a2e" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <rect id="wb15a_cell" x="842.0" y="130" width="63.8" height="80" fill="#1e3a5f" stroke="#0a1a2e" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <rect id="wb15b_cell" x="908.8" y="130" width="63.8" height="80" fill="#1e3a5f" stroke="#0a1a2e" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <rect id="wb16a_cell" x="975.7" y="130" width="63.8" height="80" fill="#1e3a5f" stroke="#0a1a2e" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <rect id="wb16b_cell" x="1042.5" y="130" width="63.8" height="80" fill="#1e3a5f" stroke="#0a1a2e" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <rect id="wb17a_cell" x="1109.3" y="130" width="63.8" height="80" fill="#1e3a5f" stroke="#0a1a2e" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <rect id="wb17b_cell" x="1176.2" y="130" width="63.8" height="80" fill="#1e3a5f" stroke="#0a1a2e" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <g font-size="10" fill="#cbd5e1" font-weight="600">
      <text x="71.9" y="160" text-anchor="middle">WB2</text>
      <text x="138.8" y="160" text-anchor="middle">WB3</text>
      <text x="205.6" y="160" text-anchor="middle">WB4</text>

      <text x="673.4" y="160" text-anchor="middle">WB11</text>
      <text x="740.3" y="160" text-anchor="middle">WB13</text>
      <text x="807.1" y="160" text-anchor="middle">WB14</text>
      <text x="873.9" y="160" text-anchor="middle">WB15A</text>
      <text x="940.8" y="160" text-anchor="middle">WB15B</text>
      <text x="1007.6" y="160" text-anchor="middle">WB16A</text>

      <text x="1141.3" y="160" text-anchor="middle">WB17A</text>
      <text x="1208.1" y="160" text-anchor="middle">WB17B</text>
    </g>
    <g font-size="10" fill="#0f172a" font-weight="700">
      <text id="wb2_label" x="71.9" y="180" text-anchor="middle" fill="#cbd5e1">--</text>
      <text id="wb3_label" x="138.8" y="180" text-anchor="middle" fill="#cbd5e1">--</text>
      <text id="wb4_label" x="205.6" y="180" text-anchor="middle" fill="#cbd5e1">--</text>
      <text id="wb5_label" x="272.4" y="180" text-anchor="middle" fill="#cbd5e1">--</text>
      <text id="wb6_label" x="339.3" y="180" text-anchor="middle" fill="#cbd5e1">--</text>
      <text id="wb7_label" x="406.1" y="180" text-anchor="middle" fill="#cbd5e1">--</text>
      <text id="wb8_label" x="472.9" y="180" text-anchor="middle" fill="#cbd5e1">--</text>
      <text id="wb9_label" x="539.8" y="180" text-anchor="middle" fill="#cbd5e1">--</text>
      <text id="wb10_label" x="606.6" y="180" text-anchor="middle" fill="#cbd5e1">--</text>
      <text id="wb11_label" x="673.4" y="180" text-anchor="middle" fill="#cbd5e1">--</text>
      <text id="wb13_label" x="740.3" y="180" text-anchor="middle" fill="#cbd5e1">--</text>
      <text id="wb14_label" x="807.1" y="180" text-anchor="middle" fill="#cbd5e1">--</text>
      <text id="wb15a_label" x="873.9" y="180" text-anchor="middle" fill="#cbd5e1">--</text>
      <text id="wb15b_label" x="940.8" y="180" text-anchor="middle" fill="#cbd5e1">--</text>
      <text id="wb16a_label" x="1007.6" y="180" text-anchor="middle" fill="#cbd5e1">--</text>
      <text id="wb16b_label" x="1074.4" y="180" text-anchor="middle" fill="#cbd5e1">--</text>
      <text id="wb17a_label" x="1141.3" y="180" text-anchor="middle" fill="#cbd5e1">--</text>
      <text id="wb17b_label" x="1208.1" y="180" text-anchor="middle" fill="#cbd5e1">--</text>
    </g>
    <text x="40" y="224" fill="#64748b" font-size="9">ΔP (mbar) — colored by reading</text>
    <g id="btp_marker" transform="translate(614.5,102)">
      <line x1="0" y1="6" x2="0" y2="28" stroke="#ef4444" stroke-width="2" stroke-dasharray="4 3"/>
      <polygon points="-8,-2 8,-2 0,8" fill="#ef4444"/>
      <text id="btp_marker_label" x="0" y="-8" fill="#ef4444" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle" font-weight="700">BTP</text>
    </g>
    <!-- Strand bed temperature tiles (E4TI021..025) -->
    <text x="40" y="260" fill="#94a3b8" font-size="11" letter-spacing="2">STRAND BED TEMPERATURES  ·  E4TI021–025</text>
    <g transform="translate(40.0,280)">
      <rect id="e4ti21_card" width="230.4" height="110" rx="8" fill="#0a1a2e" stroke="#1e3a5f"/>
      <text x="14" y="22" fill="#94a3b8" font-size="10" letter-spacing="1">E4TI021</text>
      <circle id="e4ti21_status_dot" cx="216.4" cy="16" r="5" fill="#64748b"/>
      <text id="e4ti21_value" x="14" y="80" fill="#e2e8f0" font-size="34" font-weight="700">--</text>
      <text x="216.4" y="98" fill="#64748b" font-size="10" text-anchor="end">°C  ·  bed temp</text>
    </g>
    <g transform="translate(282.4,280)">
      <rect id="e4ti22_card" width="230.4" height="110" rx="8" fill="#0a1a2e" stroke="#1e3a5f"/>
      <text x="14" y="22" fill="#94a3b8" font-size="10" letter-spacing="1">E4TI022</text>
      <circle id="e4ti22_status_dot" cx="216.4" cy="16" r="5" fill="#64748b"/>
      <text id="e4ti22_value" x="14" y="80" fill="#e2e8f0" font-size="34" font-weight="700">--</text>
      <text x="216.4" y="98" fill="#64748b" font-size="10" text-anchor="end">°C  ·  bed temp</text>
    </g>
    <g transform="translate(524.8,280)">
      <rect id="e4ti23_card" width="230.4" height="110" rx="8" fill="#0a1a2e" stroke="#1e3a5f"/>
      <text x="14" y="22" fill="#94a3b8" font-size="10" letter-spacing="1">E4TI023</text>
      <circle id="e4ti23_status_dot" cx="216.4" cy="16" r="5" fill="#64748b"/>
      <text id="e4ti23_value" x="14" y="80" fill="#e2e8f0" font-size="34" font-weight="700">--</text>
      <text x="216.4" y="98" fill="#64748b" font-size="10" text-anchor="end">°C  ·  bed temp</text>
    </g>
    <g transform="translate(767.2,280)">
      <rect id="e4ti24_card" width="230.4" height="110" rx="8" fill="#0a1a2e" stroke="#1e3a5f"/>
      <text x="14" y="22" fill="#94a3b8" font-size="10" letter-spacing="1">E4TI024</text>
      <circle id="e4ti24_status_dot" cx="216.4" cy="16" r="5" fill="#64748b"/>
      <text id="e4ti24_value" x="14" y="80" fill="#e2e8f0" font-size="34" font-weight="700">--</text>
      <text x="216.4" y="98" fill="#64748b" font-size="10" text-anchor="end">°C  ·  bed temp</text>
    </g>
    <g transform="translate(1009.6,280)">
      <rect id="e4ti25_card" width="230.4" height="110" rx="8" fill="#0a1a2e" stroke="#1e3a5f"/>
      <text x="14" y="22" fill="#94a3b8" font-size="10" letter-spacing="1">E4TI025</text>
      <circle id="e4ti25_status_dot" cx="216.4" cy="16" r="5" fill="#64748b"/>
      <text id="e4ti25_value" x="14" y="80" fill="#e2e8f0" font-size="34" font-weight="700">--</text>
      <text x="216.4" y="98" fill="#64748b" font-size="10" text-anchor="end">°C  ·  bed temp</text>
    </g>
    <!-- Heat scale legend -->
    <g transform="translate(40,420)">
      <text x="0" y="0" fill="#94a3b8" font-size="11">ΔP scale:</text>
      <rect x="80" y="-10" width="200" height="10" fill="url(#heatScale)"/>
      <text x="80" y="16" fill="#64748b" font-size="9">0</text>
      <text x="180" y="16" fill="#64748b" font-size="9" text-anchor="middle">25 mbar</text>
      <text x="280" y="16" fill="#64748b" font-size="9" text-anchor="end">≥ 40</text>
      <text id="strand_insight" x="320" y="0" fill="#cbd5e1" font-size="11">Strand status: --</text>
    </g>
  </g>

  <!-- ========== SECTION 2 — IGNITION HOOD ========== -->
  <g transform="translate(1320,100)">
    <rect width="576" height="460" rx="14" fill="url(#card)" stroke="#1e3a5f"/>
    <text x="20" y="32" fill="#e2e8f0" font-size="16" font-weight="600">Ignition Hood — Burner Zones</text>
    <text x="20" y="52" fill="#64748b" font-size="11">11 E3TI hood-zone temperatures  ·  E3TI031 – E3TI041</text>

    <!-- Flame icon + average -->
    <g transform="translate(40,90)">
      <path d="M40 0 C 60 30 80 40 70 90 C 65 110 30 110 25 90 C 15 60 30 30 40 0 Z" fill="url(#flame)">
        <animate attributeName="opacity" values="0.85;1;0.85" dur="1.5s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
      </path>
      <text x="40" y="135" fill="#e2e8f0" font-size="12" text-anchor="middle">Hood Avg</text>
      <text id="hood_avg_value" x="40" y="165" fill="#fbbf24" font-size="26" font-weight="700" text-anchor="middle">--</text>
      <text x="40" y="184" fill="#64748b" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">°C</text>
      <text x="40" y="208" fill="#94a3b8" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">min / max</text>
      <text id="hood_minmax_value" x="40" y="226" fill="#cbd5e1" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">-- / --</text>
    </g>

    <!-- Per-zone tiles, 4 cols x 3 rows = 12 slots, we use 11 -->
    <g transform="translate(130,80)">
      <rect width="110" height="92" rx="6" fill="#0a1a2e" stroke="#1e3a5f"/>
      <circle id="e3ti31_status_dot" cx="100" cy="10" r="4" fill="#64748b"/>
      <text x="10" y="18" fill="#94a3b8" font-size="9" letter-spacing="1">E3TI031</text>
      <text id="e3ti31_value" x="10" y="64" fill="#e2e8f0" font-size="24" font-weight="700">--</text>
      <text x="100" y="80" fill="#64748b" font-size="9" text-anchor="end">°C</text>
    </g>
    <g transform="translate(248,80)">
      <rect width="110" height="92" rx="6" fill="#0a1a2e" stroke="#1e3a5f"/>
      <circle id="e3ti32_status_dot" cx="100" cy="10" r="4" fill="#64748b"/>
      <text x="10" y="18" fill="#94a3b8" font-size="9" letter-spacing="1">E3TI032</text>
      <text id="e3ti32_value" x="10" y="64" fill="#e2e8f0" font-size="24" font-weight="700">--</text>
      <text x="100" y="80" fill="#64748b" font-size="9" text-anchor="end">°C</text>
    </g>
    <g transform="translate(366,80)">
      <rect width="110" height="92" rx="6" fill="#0a1a2e" stroke="#1e3a5f"/>

      <text id="e3ti33_value" x="10" y="64" fill="#e2e8f0" font-size="24" font-weight="700">--</text>
      <text x="100" y="80" fill="#64748b" font-size="9" text-anchor="end">°C</text>
    </g>
    <g transform="translate(484,80)">
      <rect width="110" height="92" rx="6" fill="#0a1a2e" stroke="#1e3a5f"/>
      <circle id="e3ti34_status_dot" cx="100" cy="10" r="4" fill="#64748b"/>
      <text x="10" y="18" fill="#94a3b8" font-size="9" letter-spacing="1">E3TI034</text>
      <text id="e3ti34_value" x="10" y="64" fill="#e2e8f0" font-size="24" font-weight="700">--</text>
      <text x="100" y="80" fill="#64748b" font-size="9" text-anchor="end">°C</text>
    </g>
    <g transform="translate(130,180)">
      <rect width="110" height="92" rx="6" fill="#0a1a2e" stroke="#1e3a5f"/>
      <circle id="e3ti35_status_dot" cx="100" cy="10" r="4" fill="#64748b"/>
      <text x="10" y="18" fill="#94a3b8" font-size="9" letter-spacing="1">E3TI035</text>
      <text id="e3ti35_value" x="10" y="64" fill="#e2e8f0" font-size="24" font-weight="700">--</text>
      <text x="100" y="80" fill="#64748b" font-size="9" text-anchor="end">°C</text>
    </g>
    <g transform="translate(248,180)">
      <rect width="110" height="92" rx="6" fill="#0a1a2e" stroke="#1e3a5f"/>
      <circle id="e3ti36_status_dot" cx="100" cy="10" r="4" fill="#64748b"/>
      <text x="10" y="18" fill="#94a3b8" font-size="9" letter-spacing="1">E3TI036</text>
      <text id="e3ti36_value" x="10" y="64" fill="#e2e8f0" font-size="24" font-weight="700">--</text>
      <text x="100" y="80" fill="#64748b" font-size="9" text-anchor="end">°C</text>
    </g>
    <g transform="translate(366,180)">
      <rect width="110" height="92" rx="6" fill="#0a1a2e" stroke="#1e3a5f"/>
      <circle id="e3ti37_status_dot" cx="100" cy="10" r="4" fill="#64748b"/>
      <text x="10" y="18" fill="#94a3b8" font-size="9" letter-spacing="1">E3TI037</text>
      <text id="e3ti37_value" x="10" y="64" fill="#e2e8f0" font-size="24" font-weight="700">--</text>
      <text x="100" y="80" fill="#64748b" font-size="9" text-anchor="end">°C</text>
    </g>
    <g transform="translate(484,180)">
      <rect width="110" height="92" rx="6" fill="#0a1a2e" stroke="#1e3a5f"/>
      <circle id="e3ti38_status_dot" cx="100" cy="10" r="4" fill="#64748b"/>
      <text x="10" y="18" fill="#94a3b8" font-size="9" letter-spacing="1">E3TI038</text>
      <text id="e3ti38_value" x="10" y="64" fill="#e2e8f0" font-size="24" font-weight="700">--</text>
      <text x="100" y="80" fill="#64748b" font-size="9" text-anchor="end">°C</text>
    </g>
    <g transform="translate(130,280)">
      <rect width="110" height="92" rx="6" fill="#0a1a2e" stroke="#1e3a5f"/>
      <circle id="e3ti39_status_dot" cx="100" cy="10" r="4" fill="#64748b"/>
      <text x="10" y="18" fill="#94a3b8" font-size="9" letter-spacing="1">E3TI039</text>
      <text id="e3ti39_value" x="10" y="64" fill="#e2e8f0" font-size="24" font-weight="700">--</text>
      <text x="100" y="80" fill="#64748b" font-size="9" text-anchor="end">°C</text>
    </g>
    <g transform="translate(248,280)">
      <rect width="110" height="92" rx="6" fill="#0a1a2e" stroke="#1e3a5f"/>
      <circle id="e3ti40_status_dot" cx="100" cy="10" r="4" fill="#64748b"/>
      <text x="10" y="18" fill="#94a3b8" font-size="9" letter-spacing="1">E3TI040</text>
      <text id="e3ti40_value" x="10" y="64" fill="#e2e8f0" font-size="24" font-weight="700">--</text>
      <text x="100" y="80" fill="#64748b" font-size="9" text-anchor="end">°C</text>
    </g>
    <g transform="translate(366,280)">
      <rect width="110" height="92" rx="6" fill="#0a1a2e" stroke="#1e3a5f"/>
      <circle id="e3ti41_status_dot" cx="100" cy="10" r="4" fill="#64748b"/>
      <text x="10" y="18" fill="#94a3b8" font-size="9" letter-spacing="1">E3TI041</text>
      <text id="e3ti41_value" x="10" y="64" fill="#e2e8f0" font-size="24" font-weight="700">--</text>
      <text x="100" y="80" fill="#64748b" font-size="9" text-anchor="end">°C</text>
    </g>
    <text x="20" y="440" fill="#94a3b8" font-size="11">Status: <tspan id="hood_status_text" fill="#cbd5e1">--</tspan></text>
  </g>

  <!-- ========== SECTION 3 — WINDBOX ΔP RADAR ========== -->
  <g transform="translate(24,580)">
    <rect width="720" height="460" rx="14" fill="url(#card)" stroke="#1e3a5f"/>
    <text x="20" y="32" fill="#e2e8f0" font-size="16" font-weight="600">Windbox ΔP — Permeability Radar</text>
    <text x="20" y="52" fill="#64748b" font-size="11">12 windboxes mapped to radar axes  ·  lower ΔP = better bed permeability</text>

    <!-- Radar -->
    <g transform="translate(220,250)">
      <!-- rings -->
      <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="50" fill="none" stroke="#1e3a5f"/>
      <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="100" fill="none" stroke="#1e3a5f"/>
      <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="150" fill="none" stroke="#1e3a5f"/>
      <text x="6" y="-50" fill="#475569" font-size="9">10</text>
      <text x="6" y="-100" fill="#475569" font-size="9">25</text>
      <text x="6" y="-150" fill="#475569" font-size="9">40 mbar</text>
      <!-- radial axes -->
      <g stroke="#1e3a5f" opacity="0.5">
        <line x1="0" y1="0" x2="0.0" y2="-150.0"/>
        <line x1="0" y1="0" x2="75.0" y2="-129.9"/>
        <line x1="0" y1="0" x2="129.9" y2="-75.0"/>
        <line x1="0" y1="0" x2="150.0" y2="0.0"/>
        <line x1="0" y1="0" x2="129.9" y2="75.0"/>
        <line x1="0" y1="0" x2="75.0" y2="129.9"/>
        <line x1="0" y1="0" x2="0.0" y2="150.0"/>
        <line x1="0" y1="0" x2="-75.0" y2="129.9"/>
        <line x1="0" y1="0" x2="-129.9" y2="75.0"/>
        <line x1="0" y1="0" x2="-150.0" y2="0.0"/>
        <line x1="0" y1="0" x2="-129.9" y2="-75.0"/>
        <line x1="0" y1="0" x2="-75.0" y2="-129.9"/>
      </g>
      <g font-size="9" fill="#94a3b8">
        <text x="0.0" y="-164.0" text-anchor="middle">WB2</text>
        <text x="84.0" y="-141.5" text-anchor="start">WB3</text>
        <text x="145.5" y="-80.0" text-anchor="start">WB4</text>
        <text x="168.0" y="4.0" text-anchor="start">WB5</text>
        <text x="145.5" y="88.0" text-anchor="start">WB6</text>
        <text x="84.0" y="149.5" text-anchor="start">WB7</text>
        <text x="0.0" y="172.0" text-anchor="middle">WB8</text>
        <text x="-84.0" y="149.5" text-anchor="end">WB9</text>
        <text x="-145.5" y="88.0" text-anchor="end">WB10</text>
        <text x="-168.0" y="4.0" text-anchor="end">WB11</text>
        <text x="-145.5" y="-80.0" text-anchor="end">WB13</text>
        <text x="-84.0" y="-141.5" text-anchor="end">WB14</text>
      </g>
      <polygon id="radar_live" points="0,0" fill="#fbbf24" fill-opacity="0.25" stroke="#fbbf24" stroke-width="2"/>
      <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="3" fill="#475569"/>
    </g>

    <!-- Legend / insights -->
    <g transform="translate(440,100)">
      <text x="0" y="0" fill="#94a3b8" font-size="11" font-weight="600">Live shift</text>
      <rect x="0" y="10" width="14" height="14" fill="#fbbf24" opacity="0.5"/>
      <text x="22" y="22" fill="#cbd5e1" font-size="11">Current ΔP (last 5 min)</text>

      <text x="0" y="60" fill="#94a3b8" font-size="11" font-weight="600">Insights</text>
      <text id="radar_max_label" x="0" y="84" fill="#cbd5e1" font-size="11">Max ΔP: --</text>
      <text id="radar_min_label" x="0" y="104" fill="#cbd5e1" font-size="11">Min ΔP: --</text>
      <text id="radar_avg_label" x="0" y="124" fill="#cbd5e1" font-size="11">Mean ΔP: --</text>
      <text id="radar_spread_label" x="0" y="144" fill="#cbd5e1" font-size="11">Spread: --</text>

      <rect x="0" y="170" width="240" height="56" fill="#0a1a2e" stroke="#1e3a5f"/>
      <text x="10" y="190" fill="#94a3b8" font-size="10" letter-spacing="1">PERMEABILITY HEALTH</text>
      <text id="radar_health_value" x="230" y="218" fill="#fbbf24" font-size="22" font-weight="700" text-anchor="end">--</text>
      <text x="10" y="218" fill="#94a3b8" font-size="10">% normal cells</text>
    </g>
  </g>

  <!-- Footer note inside the SVG -->
  <text x="28" y="1060" fill="#475569" font-size="10">SP4 Critical Process Monitoring  ·  34 SVG bindings  ·  refresh 5s  ·  trends + alarms below in native Grafana panels</text>
  <text x="1892" y="1060" fill="#475569" font-size="10" text-anchor="end">Marcus Calidus SVG  ·  Grafana 10.0.1</text>
</svg>

items.description: Arrow facing up down left right
items.name: arrow-up-down-left-right

panels.svg_data:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 1920 1080" font-family="'Segoe UI', Arial, sans-serif">
<defs>
<linearGradient id="bg" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
<stop offset="0" stop-color="#0c1322"/><stop offset="1" stop-color="#0a1a2e"/>
</linearGradient>
<linearGradient id="card" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
<stop offset="0" stop-color="#152037"/><stop offset="1" stop-color="#0e192c"/>
</linearGradient>
<linearGradient id="heatScale" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="0">
<stop offset="0" stop-color="#1e3a5f"/>
<stop offset="0.25" stop-color="#22d3ee"/>
<stop offset="0.5" stop-color="#22c55e"/>
<stop offset="0.75" stop-color="#f59e0b"/>
<stop offset="1" stop-color="#ef4444"/>
</linearGradient>
<linearGradient id="flame" x1="0" y1="1" x2="0" y2="0">
<stop offset="0" stop-color="#fde047"/>
<stop offset="0.5" stop-color="#fb923c"/>
<stop offset="1" stop-color="#dc2626"/>
</linearGradient>
</defs>
<rect width="1920" height="1080" fill="url(#bg)"/>

 

  <!-- HEADER -->
<rect x="0" y="0" width="1920" height="84" fill="#06101f"/>
<text x="32" y="34" fill="#fbbf24" font-size="12" letter-spacing="4">LITMUS EDGE  •  SP4 SINTER PLANT</text>
<text x="32" y="64" fill="#e2e8f0" font-size="26" font-weight="700">Critical Process Monitoring</text>
<text x="1888" y="34" fill="#94a3b8" font-size="12" text-anchor="end">18 windboxes  ·  11 hood zones  ·  5 strand bed temps</text>
<text x="1888" y="58" fill="#94a3b8" font-size="12" text-anchor="end">DB: tsdata  ·  Measurement: SP4Iba.94F1A3D6…D360</text>
<text x="1888" y="76" fill="#94a3b8" font-size="11" text-anchor="end" id="header_updated">Updated --:--:--</text>
<rect x="0" y="84" width="1920" height="2" fill="#1e3a5f"/>

 

  <!-- ========== SECTION 1 — SINTER STRAND WINDBOX MAP ========== -->
<g transform="translate(24,100)">
<rect width="1280" height="460" rx="14" fill="url(#card)" stroke="#1e3a5f"/>
<text x="20" y="32" fill="#e2e8f0" font-size="16" font-weight="600">Sinter Strand — Windbox Map (ΔP + Bed Temperatures + BTP)</text>
<text x="20" y="52" fill="#64748b" font-size="11">18 WINDBOX_*_DIFFERENTIAL_PRESSURE  ·  5 E4TI bed temps  ·  burn-through point follows hottest bed</text>

 

    <!-- Strand layout: 18 cells across 1240px width with 4px gap -->
<!-- Windbox cells (filled by JS based on ΔP) -->
<rect id="wb2_cell" x="40.0" y="130" width="63.8" height="80" fill="#1e3a5f" stroke="#0a1a2e" stroke-width="0.5"/>
<rect id="wb3_cell" x="106.8" y="130" width="63.8" height="80" fill="#1e3a5f" stroke="#0a1a2e" stroke-width="0.5"/>
<rect id="wb4_cell" x="173.7" y="130" width="63.8" height="80" fill="#1e3a5f" stroke="#0a1a2e" stroke-width="0.5"/>
<rect id="wb5_cell" x="240.5" y="130" width="63.8" height="80" fill="#1e3a5f" stroke="#0a1a2e" stroke-width="0.5"/>
<rect id="wb6_cell" x="307.3" y="130" width="63.8" height="80" fill="#1e3a5f" stroke="#0a1a2e" stroke-width="0.5"/>
<rect id="wb7_cell" x="374.2" y="130" width="63.8" height="80" fill="#1e3a5f" stroke="#0a1a2e" stroke-width="0.5"/>
<rect id="wb8_cell" x="441.0" y="130" width="63.8" height="80" fill="#1e3a5f" stroke="#0a1a2e" stroke-width="0.5"/>
<rect id="wb9_cell" x="507.8" y="130" width="63.8" height="80" fill="#1e3a5f" stroke="#0a1a2e" stroke-width="0.5"/>
<rect id="wb10_cell" x="574.7" y="130" width="63.8" height="80" fill="#1e3a5f" stroke="#0a1a2e" stroke-width="0.5"/>
<rect id="wb11_cell" x="641.5" y="130" width="63.8" height="80" fill="#1e3a5f" stroke="#0a1a2e" stroke-width="0.5"/>
<rect id="wb13_cell" x="708.3" y="130" width="63.8" height="80" fill="#1e3a5f" stroke="#0a1a2e" stroke-width="0.5"/>
<rect id="wb14_cell" x="775.2" y="130" width="63.8" height="80" fill="#1e3a5f" stroke="#0a1a2e" stroke-width="0.5"/>
<rect id="wb15a_cell" x="842.0" y="130" width="63.8" height="80" fill="#1e3a5f" stroke="#0a1a2e" stroke-width="0.5"/>
<rect id="wb15b_cell" x="908.8" y="130" width="63.8" height="80" fill="#1e3a5f" stroke="#0a1a2e" stroke-width="0.5"/>
<rect id="wb16a_cell" x="975.7" y="130" width="63.8" height="80" fill="#1e3a5f" stroke="#0a1a2e" stroke-width="0.5"/>
<rect id="wb16b_cell" x="1042.5" y="130" width="63.8" height="80" fill="#1e3a5f" stroke="#0a1a2e" stroke-width="0.5"/>
<rect id="wb17a_cell" x="1109.3" y="130" width="63.8" height="80" fill="#1e3a5f" stroke="#0a1a2e" stroke-width="0.5"/>
<rect id="wb17b_cell" x="1176.2" y="130" width="63.8" height="80" fill="#1e3a5f" stroke="#0a1a2e" stroke-width="0.5"/>
<g font-size="10" fill="#cbd5e1" font-weight="600">
<text x="71.9" y="160" text-anchor="middle">WB2</text>
<text x="138.8" y="160" text-anchor="middle">WB3</text>
<text x="205.6" y="160" text-anchor="middle">WB4</text>
<text x="272.4" y="160" text-anchor="middle">WB5</text>
<text x="339.3" y="160" text-anchor="middle">WB6</text>
<text x="406.1" y="160" text-anchor="middle">WB7</text>
<text x="472.9" y="160" text-anchor="middle">WB8</text>
<text x="539.8" y="160" text-anchor="middle">WB9</text>
<text x="606.6" y="160" text-anchor="middle">WB10</text>
<text x="673.4" y="160" text-anchor="middle">WB11</text>
<text x="740.3" y="160" text-anchor="middle">WB13</text>
<text x="807.1" y="160" text-anchor="middle">WB14</text>
<text x="873.9" y="160" text-anchor="middle">WB15A</text>
<text x="940.8" y="160" text-anchor="middle">WB15B</text>
<text x="1007.6" y="160" text-anchor="middle">WB16A</text>
<text x="1074.4" y="160" text-anchor="middle">WB16B</text>
<text x="1141.3" y="160" text-anchor="middle">WB17A</text>
<text x="1208.1" y="160" text-anchor="middle">WB17B</text>
</g>
<g font-size="10" fill="#0f172a" font-weight="700">
<text id="wb2_label" x="71.9" y="180" text-anchor="middle" fill="#cbd5e1">--</text>
<text id="wb3_label" x="138.8" y="180" text-anchor="middle" fill="#cbd5e1">--</text>
<text id="wb4_label" x="205.6" y="180" text-anchor="middle" fill="#cbd5e1">--</text>
<text id="wb5_label" x="272.4" y="180" text-anchor="middle" fill="#cbd5e1">--</text>
<text id="wb6_label" x="339.3" y="180" text-anchor="middle" fill="#cbd5e1">--</text>
<text id="wb7_label" x="406.1" y="180" text-anchor="middle" fill="#cbd5e1">--</text>
<text id="wb8_label" x="472.9" y="180" text-anchor="middle" fill="#cbd5e1">--</text>
<text id="wb9_label" x="539.8" y="180" text-anchor="middle" fill="#cbd5e1">--</text>
<text id="wb10_label" x="606.6" y="180" text-anchor="middle" fill="#cbd5e1">--</text>
<text id="wb11_label" x="673.4" y="180" text-anchor="middle" fill="#cbd5e1">--</text>
<text id="wb13_label" x="740.3" y="180" text-anchor="middle" fill="#cbd5e1">--</text>
<text id="wb14_label" x="807.1" y="180" text-anchor="middle" fill="#cbd5e1">--</text>
<text id="wb15a_label" x="873.9" y="180" text-anchor="middle" fill="#cbd5e1">--</text>
<text id="wb15b_label" x="940.8" y="180" text-anchor="middle" fill="#cbd5e1">--</text>
<text id="wb16a_label" x="1007.6" y="180" text-anchor="middle" fill="#cbd5e1">--</text>
<text id="wb16b_label" x="1074.4" y="180" text-anchor="middle" fill="#cbd5e1">--</text>
<text id="wb17a_label" x="1141.3" y="180" text-anchor="middle" fill="#cbd5e1">--</text>
<text id="wb17b_label" x="1208.1" y="180" text-anchor="middle" fill="#cbd5e1">--</text>
</g>
<text x="40" y="224" fill="#64748b" font-size="9">ΔP (mbar) — colored by reading</text>
<g id="btp_marker" transform="translate(614.5,102)">
<line x1="0" y1="6" x2="0" y2="28" stroke="#ef4444" stroke-width="2" stroke-dasharray="4 3"/>
<polygon points="-8,-2 8,-2 0,8" fill="#ef4444"/>
<text id="btp_marker_label" x="0" y="-8" fill="#ef4444" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle" font-weight="700">BTP</text>
</g>
<!-- Strand bed temperature tiles (E4TI021..025) -->
<text x="40" y="260" fill="#94a3b8" font-size="11" letter-spacing="2">STRAND BED TEMPERATURES  ·  E4TI021–025</text>
<g transform="translate(40.0,280)">
<rect id="e4ti21_card" width="230.4" height="110" rx="8" fill="#0a1a2e" stroke="#1e3a5f"/>
<text x="14" y="22" fill="#94a3b8" font-size="10" letter-spacing="1">E4TI021</text>
<circle id="e4ti21_status_dot" cx="216.4" cy="16" r="5" fill="#64748b"/>
<text id="e4ti21_value" x="14" y="80" fill="#e2e8f0" font-size="34" font-weight="700">--</text>
<text x="216.4" y="98" fill="#64748b" font-size="10" text-anchor="end">°C  ·  bed temp</text>
</g>
<g transform="translate(282.4,280)">
<rect id="e4ti22_card" width="230.4" height="110" rx="8" fill="#0a1a2e" stroke="#1e3a5f"/>
<text x="14" y="22" fill="#94a3b8" font-size="10" letter-spacing="1">E4TI022</text>
<circle id="e4ti22_status_dot" cx="216.4" cy="16" r="5" fill="#64748b"/>
<text id="e4ti22_value" x="14" y="80" fill="#e2e8f0" font-size="34" font-weight="700">--</text>
<text x="216.4" y="98" fill="#64748b" font-size="10" text-anchor="end">°C  ·  bed temp</text>
</g>
<g transform="translate(524.8,280)">
<rect id="e4ti23_card" width="230.4" height="110" rx="8" fill="#0a1a2e" stroke="#1e3a5f"/>
<text x="14" y="22" fill="#94a3b8" font-size="10" letter-spacing="1">E4TI023</text>
<circle id="e4ti23_status_dot" cx="216.4" cy="16" r="5" fill="#64748b"/>
<text id="e4ti23_value" x="14" y="80" fill="#e2e8f0" font-size="34" font-weight="700">--</text>
<text x="216.4" y="98" fill="#64748b" font-size="10" text-anchor="end">°C  ·  bed temp</text>
</g>
<g transform="translate(767.2,280)">
<rect id="e4ti24_card" width="230.4" height="110" rx="8" fill="#0a1a2e" stroke="#1e3a5f"/>
<text x="14" y="22" fill="#94a3b8" font-size="10" letter-spacing="1">E4TI024</text>
<circle id="e4ti24_status_dot" cx="216.4" cy="16" r="5" fill="#64748b"/>
<text id="e4ti24_value" x="14" y="80" fill="#e2e8f0" font-size="34" font-weight="700">--</text>
<text x="216.4" y="98" fill="#64748b" font-size="10" text-anchor="end">°C  ·  bed temp</text>
</g>
<g transform="translate(1009.6,280)">
<rect id="e4ti25_card" width="230.4" height="110" rx="8" fill="#0a1a2e" stroke="#1e3a5f"/>
<text x="14" y="22" fill="#94a3b8" font-size="10" letter-spacing="1">E4TI025</text>
<circle id="e4ti25_status_dot" cx="216.4" cy="16" r="5" fill="#64748b"/>
<text id="e4ti25_value" x="14" y="80" fill="#e2e8f0" font-size="34" font-weight="700">--</text>
<text x="216.4" y="98" fill="#64748b" font-size="10" text-anchor="end">°C  ·  bed temp</text>
</g>
<!-- Heat scale legend -->
<g transform="translate(40,420)">
<text x="0" y="0" fill="#94a3b8" font-size="11">ΔP scale:</text>
<rect x="80" y="-10" width="200" height="10" fill="url(#heatScale)"/>
<text x="80" y="16" fill="#64748b" font-size="9">0</text>
<text x="180" y="16" fill="#64748b" font-size="9" text-anchor="middle">25 mbar</text>
<text x="280" y="16" fill="#64748b" font-size="9" text-anchor="end">≥ 40</text>
<text id="strand_insight" x="320" y="0" fill="#cbd5e1" font-size="11">Strand status: --</text>
</g>
</g>

 

  <!-- ========== SECTION 2 — IGNITION HOOD ========== -->
<g transform="translate(1320,100)">
<rect width="576" height="460" rx="14" fill="url(#card)" stroke="#1e3a5f"/>
<text x="20" y="32" fill="#e2e8f0" font-size="16" font-weight="600">Ignition Hood — Burner Zones</text>
<text x="20" y="52" fill="#64748b" font-size="11">11 E3TI hood-zone temperatures  ·  E3TI031 – E3TI041</text>

 

    <!-- Flame icon + average -->
<g transform="translate(40,90)">
<path d="M40 0 C 60 30 80 40 70 90 C 65 110 30 110 25 90 C 15 60 30 30 40 0 Z" fill="url(#flame)">
<animate attributeName="opacity" values="0.85;1;0.85" dur="1.5s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
</path>
<text x="40" y="135" fill="#e2e8f0" font-size="12" text-anchor="middle">Hood Avg</text>
<text id="hood_avg_value" x="40" y="165" fill="#fbbf24" font-size="26" font-weight="700" text-anchor="middle">--</text>
<text x="40" y="184" fill="#64748b" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">°C</text>
<text x="40" y="208" fill="#94a3b8" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">min / max</text>
<text id="hood_minmax_value" x="40" y="226" fill="#cbd5e1" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">-- / --</text>
</g>

 

    <!-- Per-zone tiles, 4 cols x 3 rows = 12 slots, we use 11 -->
<g transform="translate(130,80)">
<rect width="110" height="92" rx="6" fill="#0a1a2e" stroke="#1e3a5f"/>
<circle id="e3ti31_status_dot" cx="100" cy="10" r="4" fill="#64748b"/>
<text x="10" y="18" fill="#94a3b8" font-size="9" letter-spacing="1">E3TI031</text>
<text id="e3ti31_value" x="10" y="64" fill="#e2e8f0" font-size="24" font-weight="700">--</text>
<text x="100" y="80" fill="#64748b" font-size="9" text-anchor="end">°C</text>
</g>
<g transform="translate(248,80)">
<rect width="110" height="92" rx="6" fill="#0a1a2e" stroke="#1e3a5f"/>
<circle id="e3ti32_status_dot" cx="100" cy="10" r="4" fill="#64748b"/>
<text x="10" y="18" fill="#94a3b8" font-size="9" letter-spacing="1">E3TI032</text>
<text id="e3ti32_value" x="10" y="64" fill="#e2e8f0" font-size="24" font-weight="700">--</text>
<text x="100" y="80" fill="#64748b" font-size="9" text-anchor="end">°C</text>
</g>
<g transform="translate(366,80)">
<rect width="110" height="92" rx="6" fill="#0a1a2e" stroke="#1e3a5f"/>
<circle id="e3ti33_status_dot" cx="100" cy="10" r="4" fill="#64748b"/>
<text x="10" y="18" fill="#94a3b8" font-size="9" letter-spacing="1">E3TI033</text>
<text id="e3ti33_value" x="10" y="64" fill="#e2e8f0" font-size="24" font-weight="700">--</text>
<text x="100" y="80" fill="#64748b" font-size="9" text-anchor="end">°C</text>
</g>
<g transform="translate(484,80)">
<rect width="110" height="92" rx="6" fill="#0a1a2e" stroke="#1e3a5f"/>
<circle id="e3ti34_status_dot" cx="100" cy="10" r="4" fill="#64748b"/>
<text x="10" y="18" fill="#94a3b8" font-size="9" letter-spacing="1">E3TI034</text>
<text id="e3ti34_value" x="10" y="64" fill="#e2e8f0" font-size="24" font-weight="700">--</text>
<text x="100" y="80" fill="#64748b" font-size="9" text-anchor="end">°C</text>
</g>
<g transform="translate(130,180)">
<rect width="110" height="92" rx="6" fill="#0a1a2e" stroke="#1e3a5f"/>
<circle id="e3ti35_status_dot" cx="100" cy="10" r="4" fill="#64748b"/>
<text x="10" y="18" fill="#94a3b8" font-size="9" letter-spacing="1">E3TI035</text>
<text id="e3ti35_value" x="10" y="64" fill="#e2e8f0" font-size="24" font-weight="700">--</text>
<text x="100" y="80" fill="#64748b" font-size="9" text-anchor="end">°C</text>
</g>
<g transform="translate(248,180)">
<rect width="110" height="92" rx="6" fill="#0a1a2e" stroke="#1e3a5f"/>
<circle id="e3ti36_status_dot" cx="100" cy="10" r="4" fill="#64748b"/>
<text x="10" y="18" fill="#94a3b8" font-size="9" letter-spacing="1">E3TI036</text>
<text id="e3ti36_value" x="10" y="64" fill="#e2e8f0" font-size="24" font-weight="700">--</text>
<text x="100" y="80" fill="#64748b" font-size="9" text-anchor="end">°C</text>
</g>

  <!-- ========== SECTION 3 — WINDBOX ΔP RADAR ========== -->
<g transform="translate(24,580)">
<rect width="720" height="460" rx="14" fill="url(#card)" stroke="#1e3a5f"/>
<text x="20" y="32" fill="#e2e8f0" font-size="16" font-weight="600">Windbox ΔP — Permeability Radar</text>
<text x="20" y="52" fill="#64748b" font-size="11">12 windboxes mapped to radar axes  ·  lower ΔP = better bed permeability</text>

 

    <!-- Radar -->
<g transform="translate(220,250)">
<!-- rings -->
<circle cx="0" cy="0" r="50" fill="none" stroke="#1e3a5f"/>
<circle cx="0" cy="0" r="100" fill="none" stroke="#1e3a5f"/>
<circle cx="0" cy="0" r="150" fill="none" stroke="#1e3a5f"/>
<text x="6" y="-50" fill="#475569" font-size="9">10</text>
<text x="6" y="-100" fill="#475569" font-size="9">25</text>
<text x="6" y="-150" fill="#475569" font-size="9">40 mbar</text>
<!-- radial axes -->
<g stroke="#1e3a5f" opacity="0.5">
<line x1="0" y1="0" x2="0.0" y2="-150.0"/>
<line x1="0" y1="0" x2="75.0" y2="-129.9"/>

<line x1="0" y1="0" x2="-129.9" y2="75.0"/>
<line x1="0" y1="0" x2="-150.0" y2="0.0"/>
<line x1="0" y1="0" x2="-129.9" y2="-75.0"/>
<line x1="0" y1="0" x2="-75.0" y2="-129.9"/>
</g>
<g font-size="9" fill="#94a3b8">
<text x="0.0" y="-164.0" text-anchor="middle">WB2</text>
<text x="84.0" y="-141.5" text-anchor="start">WB3</text>
<text x="145.5" y="-80.0" text-anchor="start">WB4</text>
<text x="168.0" y="4.0" text-anchor="start">WB5</text>
<text x="145.5" y="88.0" text-anchor="start">WB6</text>
<text x="84.0" y="149.5" text-anchor="start">WB7</text>
<text x="0.0" y="172.0" text-anchor="middle">WB8</text>
<text x="-84.0" y="149.5" text-anchor="end">WB9</text>
<text x="-145.5" y="88.0" text-anchor="end">WB10</text>
<text x="-168.0" y="4.0" text-anchor="end">WB11</text>
<text x="-145.5" y="-80.0" text-anchor="end">WB13</text>
<text x="-84.0" y="-141.5" text-anchor="end">WB14</text>
</g>
<polygon id="radar_live" points="0,0" fill="#fbbf24" fill-opacity="0.25" stroke="#fbbf24" stroke-width="2"/>
<circle cx="0" cy="0" r="3" fill="#475569"/>
</g>

 

    <!-- Legend / insights -->
<g transform="translate(440,100)">
<text x="0" y="0" fill="#94a3b8" font-size="11" font-weight="600">Live shift</text>
<rect x="0" y="10" width="14" height="14" fill="#fbbf24" opacity="0.5"/>
<text x="22" y="22" fill="#cbd5e1" font-size="11">Current ΔP (last 5 min)</text>

 

      <text x="0" y="60" fill="#94a3b8" font-size="11" font-weight="600">Insights</text>
<text id="radar_max_label" x="0" y="84" fill="#cbd5e1" font-size="11">Max ΔP: --</text>
<text id="radar_min_label" x="0" y="104" fill="#cbd5e1" font-size="11">Min ΔP: --</text>
<text id="radar_avg_label" x="0" y="124" fill="#cbd5e1" font-size="11">Mean ΔP: --</text>
<text id="radar_spread_label" x="0" y="144" fill="#cbd5e1" font-size="11">Spread: --</text>

 

      <rect x="0" y="170" width="240" height="56" fill="#0a1a2e" stroke="#1e3a5f"/>
<text x="10" y="190" fill="#94a3b8" font-size="10" letter-spacing="1">PERMEABILITY HEALTH</text>
<text id="radar_health_value" x="230" y="218" fill="#fbbf24" font-size="22" font-weight="700" text-anchor="end">--</text>
<text x="10" y="218" fill="#94a3b8" font-size="10">% normal cells</text>
</g>
</g>

 

  <!-- Footer note inside the SVG -->
<text x="28" y="1060" fill="#475569" font-size="10">SP4 Critical Process Monitoring  ·  34 SVG bindings  ·  refresh 5s  ·  trends + alarms below in native Grafana panels</text>
<text x="1892" y="1060" fill="#475569" font-size="10" text-anchor="end">Marcus Calidus SVG  ·  Grafana 10.0.1</text>
</svg>

targets.query: SELECT mean("value") FROM "SP4Iba.94F1A3D6-7319-4C42-8744-CFE06FD3D360" WHERE "tag" = 'Applications_Application_2_E4TI023' AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(linear)

SELECT mean("value") FROM "SP4Iba.94F1A3D6-7319-4C42-8744-CFE06FD3D360" WHERE ("tag" = 'WINDBOX_2_DIFFERENTIAL_PRESSURE' OR "tag" = 'WINDBOX_3_DIFFERENTIAL_PRESSURE' OR "tag" = 'WINDBOX_4_DIFFERENTIAL_PRESSURE' OR "tag" = 'WINDBOX_5_DIFFERENTIAL_PRESSURE' OR "tag" = 'WINDBOX_6_DIFFERENTIAL_PRESSURE' OR "tag" = 'WINDBOX_7_DIFFERENTIAL_PRESSURE' OR "tag" = 'WINDBOX_8_DIFFERENTIAL_PRESSURE' OR "tag" = 'WINDBOX_9_DIFFERENTIAL_PRESSURE' OR "tag" = 'WINDBOX_10_DIFFERENTIAL_PRESSURE' OR "tag" = 'WINDBOX_11_DIFFERENTIAL_PRESSURE' OR "tag" = 'WINDBOX_13_DIFFERENTIAL_PRESSURE' OR "tag" = 'WINDBOX_14_DIFFERENTIAL_PRESSURE' OR "tag" = 'WINDBOX_15A_DIFFERENTIAL_PRESSURE' OR "tag" = 'WINDBOX_15B_DIFFERENTIAL_PRESSURE' OR "tag" = 'WINDBOX_16A_DIFFERENTIAL_PRESSURE' OR "tag" = 'WINDBOX_16B_DIFFERENTIAL_PRESSURE' OR "tag" = 'WINDBOX_17A_DIFFERENTIAL_PRESSURE' OR "tag" = 'WINDBOX_17B_DIFFERENTIAL_PRESSURE' ) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(linear)
